creator: fmysh@iijmio-mail.jp
text:
On 2008/10/25, at 1:06, TAOKA Fumiyoshi wrote:

 > The reason for adding this port is that the current stable version of
 > ScientificPython requires Numeric-2.3.

The latest stable release of ScientificPython requires NumPy rather
than Numeric.

Please close this PR.
